name: Install Homebrew
description: Installs Homebrew on macOS (and Linux). Ensures bash >=4 is available before handing off to the main installer.

formulae.description: Comma-separated list of Homebrew formulae to install (e.g. 'git,curl,jq').

casks.description: Comma-separated list of Homebrew casks to install (e.g. 'docker,visual-studio-code').

taps.description: Comma-separated list of Homebrew taps to add before installing formulae/casks.

logfile.description: Append install log to this file path.
